name: Search4faces
description: Face search in VK/OK social networks Tool: https://search4faces.com/. [SCAFFOLD generated from XORCISM.TOOL #734 by tool_to_connector.py — implement run() in run.py to map Search4faces output to the XORCISM findings model {assets, services, cpes, vulns}.]

parameters.name: target
